target_area.description: Limitations opening paragraph on evidence boundary, clean pool, stress set, and Qwen2.5-VL coordinate semantics

change_summary: Reframed the Limitations opening from a narrow-evidence list into a deliberate evidence-boundary statement.
Kept the clean visual-QA pool size, 20-pair final gate caveat, 30-pair stress-set composition, and Qwen2.5-VL coordinate caveat unchanged.
Changed the broad-distribution caveat to a clearer ACL-style formulation: controlled material-shift stress-test claim, not a broad benchmark over GRScenes.

observations: Page 9 keeps the Discussion, Limitations, and Conclusion flow on the same page.
The Limitations opening now reads as a boundary statement and removes the looser 'a broad GRScenes benchmark distribution' phrasing.
Page 10 remains visually stable after the one-line page 9 compaction.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

verification.evidence: ok=true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract_word_count=169
PDF text contains the new evidence-boundary, preservation-claim, material-shift stress-test, broad benchmark, and coordinate-semantics wording.

workspace_note: The repository had unrelated pre-existing modified paper and table files before this round. This evidence record only claims the round28 Limitations opening polish plus the new record/evidence files.
